description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.1 Docker image and caches the Ruby bundle directory at vendor/bundle. Define a single stage called deploy and add a build_site job in that stage. The job should run `gem install bundler`, then `bundle install --path vendor/bundle`, then `bundle exec jekyll build -d public` (which will use the provided Jekyll configuration with baseurl, defaults, plugins, etc.). Publish the generated `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and configure the job to run only on the `main` branch. Set the environment variable `JEKYLL_ENV=production` for the build.
